title: Postinfectious Glomerulonephritis
buzzwords: child with periorbital and peripheral edema
nephritic syndrome weeks after extrarenal infection
dysmorphic RBCs and RBC casts on urinalysis
low serum C3 with normal C4
subepithelial dome-shaped humps on electron microscopy
starry sky granular IgG/C3 after group A strep
